[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A close-up selfie-style image shows two children looking toward the camera indoors, with a wall and a colorful graphic in the background.

Main Subject: The main visual focus is a young boy in the foreground with short dark hair, a round face, and brown eyes, shown from the shoulders up at a slight tilt; his lips are slightly pursed and he faces the camera directly.

Setting: The scene appears to be indoors under soft, even lighting. Behind the children, a wall is visible with a yellow square containing a black-and-white QR-code-like pattern, and to the left there is a green rectangular overlay area with partial white text that is cut off.

Visual Details: The foreground boy has a neutral expression with slightly parted or pursed lips. Another child appears partially on the left side of the image, with short dark hair and brown eyes, also facing the camera. The background includes a blurred seat or cushion area in the lower left, and a dark blue or dark gray area near the right side. The camera angle is close and slightly off-level, emphasizing faces in the foreground.

Visible Text: “THANKS!” and “SC” are visible; the rest of the text is unclear. A yellow area contains a QR-code-like pattern with no readable text.

Practical Summary: The image is a close-up indoor portrait of two children looking at the camera. A wall behind them includes a yellow QR-code-like graphic and a partially visible green overlay with the word “THANKS!”.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
